title: astragalus floccosus
intro: Astragalus floccosus, also known as the woolly milkvetch, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of western North America. It is a type of legume, belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae), and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as enhancing the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus floccosus can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
